subcodes.first_line: O Asadu'llah! The heart is aflame, and the Luminary of the horizons is saddened by the tyranny of the people of discord and hypocrisy. By My life [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اسدالله قلب در احتراق و نیر آفاق از ظلم اهل شقاق و نفاق محزون لعمر الله
subcodes.subjects: @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @firmness in the Covenant
